rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes for component ports, not implementation-level bindings
Use visible feature names and concrete bounds for input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees
generic_rules: Declare helper variables with explicit types matching their expressions to avoid type mismatches
Formulate range assumptions using named constants or visible relations for clarity and validity
Structure AGREE annex blocks with clear separation of assumptions and guarantees
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use boolean helper declarations for range checks: eq var : bool = expr
Ensure all visible identifiers are properly scoped and accessible in the component type
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type contracts
Do not use subcomponent ports directly in component type contracts without proper variable representation
